shortDescription.default: OBS Module — SPFx web parts for the Flank Speed legacy migration

longDescription.default: Operational Business Systems (OBS) module migrated from .NET MVC to SharePoint Framework. Includes list view with filtering, operations dashboard with summary counts, and detail view with comments and audit history.

features.title: OBS Module Web Parts
features.description: Deploys the OBS List View, Dashboard, and Detail View web parts.
